summary: Comprehensive testing of GlobalAgri Commodities corporate website completed. All backend APIs working correctly, frontend UI fully functional with minor accessibility warnings.

design_issues.issue: Missing DialogTitle and Description for accessibility

passed_tests: Insights API with 6 articles and filtering
Homepage hero section and all teasers
Job detail pages and application forms
Contact form with dropdowns and validation
All product detail pages (grains, feedstuff, pulses)
About, Global Presence, Sustainability, Risk & Logistics pages
